Description: The Root of an Annex, normally adds Value to its Annex.
The Channel of an Annex, normally adds Value to its Annex.
The Proficiency stands for the Tangle and displaces another when selected. The Tangle will always be accompanied by the original
Adds Value to an Annex, but the Annex will only activate if the User meets the Umbral  and Tangle Costs.
Grants an Annex a specific Nimbed ability.
Personality Annexes have Hitches in them.
Personality and Master-Annexes can store additional Proficiencies in Extra Proficiency Slots. This is one such slot.
Conflict Proficiencies define the sides of the Plot, and of course help define the Embodiments, like Monsters, Tones, Characters, Locations, and so on.
Lite Proficiencies are only used in Lite Annexes. They have a multiplier rather than having multiple different Proficiencies.
The Proficiency stands for the Persona of a Personality Annex.
The Proficiency stands for the Core of a Personality Annex.
The Proficiency stands for the a Trigger Proficiency of a Hitch or Annex.
The Proficiency stands for another T13 Element, such as another Annex, a Hitch or a pattern like a Descendant or Character.
